# Backend

### Error Codes
- ERR_BACKEND_TIMEOUT
- ERR_BACKEND_RETRYABLE
<!-- AXION:SEAM_DEFINITION_END -->

This should trigger SEAM_OWNER_VIOLATION because backend is claiming ownership of error_model seam which belongs to contracts.
